titleStmt.title: SII 39.203: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 203. (A.R. No. 203 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL (INSIDE) OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA OF THE SAME TEMPLE •••••••••• ŚAKA 1483 (1561 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription contains the information regarding an agreement made between the Jīyar and the Sthānattār of the temple for the supply of food offerings to the god and goddess at the time of procession.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 3ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa durmmati samvatsarattu tulānāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu saptamiyum budhavāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭa nakṣatrattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻama
ṇṭalattu tāmalkoṭṭattu tāmalṉāṭṭu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi perumāḷ poreṟṟu nayiṉār koyil keḻvimātavajiyarum stāṉattārum śrīpati śimkarājayaṉukkup poliyūṭṭu śāsanam pa
ṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tāmaperumāṉukku samarppitta poṉ muppatukkum nilavoṟṟi piṭittu Atil Utayam koṇṭu perumāḷ vicayarākavarum navarātraṉācciyār periya pirāṭṭiyārum tiruviti Eḻu
ntaruḷiṉa potellām Aṉaittaḻukuṅ kaṇṭa perumāḷ kovil vācalile kaṟpūram tirutocaipaṭṭi tammu yumāka Amutu ceyyap paṇṇakkaṭavomākavum tinam Oru tirumālai
yum cāttakkaṭavomākavum yippaṭikku
Digital edition of SII 39.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
